dct_title_s:
Nieuwe Pascaert van Oost Indien Verthoonende hen van C. de Bona Esperanca tot aen het
          Landt van Eſo. Geleyt op Waßende Graeden en van Veel Fouten Verbetert
dct_alternative_sm: New map of East Indies from Cape of Good Hope to Japan and Australia
dct_description_sm:
Two cartouches are shown on this map. The cartouche at the top is similar to Otten's map
        (see NOR 0252). The second cartouche provides the name and address of the author and is
        surrounded by dolphins and European traders. Two compass roses radiate rhumb lines.
dct_rights_sm: Image from the Dr. Oscar I. Norwich collection of maps of Africa and its islands, 1486 - ca. 1865 courtesy Stanford University Libraries. This item is in the public domain. There are no restrictions on use. If you have questions, please contact the David Rumsey Map Center at rumseymapcenter@stanford.edu.
